using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Linq.Expressions;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Reflection.Emit;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.Versioning;
using System.Security;
using System.Security.Permissions;
using System.Text;
using Assets.Scripts;
using Assets.Scripts.Networking;
using Assets.Scripts.Objects;
using Assets.Scripts.Objects.Motherboards;
using Assets.Scripts.Serialization;
using Assets.Scripts.Util;
using HarmonyLib;
using LaunchPadBooster.Networking;
using LaunchPadBooster.Utils;
using Steamworks;
using UI;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.Events;
using UnityEngine.Networking;

[assembly: CompilationRelaxations(8)]
[assembly: RuntimeCompatibility(WrapNonExceptionThrows = true)]
[assembly: Debuggable(DebuggableAttribute.DebuggingModes.Default | DebuggableAttribute.DebuggingModes.DisableOptimizations | DebuggableAttribute.DebuggingModes.IgnoreSymbolStoreSequencePoints | DebuggableAttribute.DebuggingModes.EnableEditAndContinue)]
[assembly: AssemblyTitle("LaunchPadBooster")]
[assembly: AssemblyDescription("LaunchPadBooster")]
[assembly: AssemblyCompany("LaunchPadBooster")]
[assembly: AssemblyProduct("LaunchPadBooster")]
[assembly: AssemblyFileVersion("0.1.8")]
[assembly: TargetFramework(".NETFramework,Version=v4.8", FrameworkDisplayName = ".NET Framework 4.8")]
[assembly: SecurityPermission(SecurityAction.RequestMinimum, SkipVerification = true)]
[assembly: AssemblyVersion("0.1.8.0")]
[module: UnverifiableCode]
namespace LaunchPadBooster
{
	public static class LaunchPadBooster
	{
		public const string NAME = "LaunchPadBooster";

		public const string GUID = "launchpad.booster";

		public const string VERSION = "0.1.8";
	}
	public sealed class Mod
	{
		private static readonly object allLock = new object();

		public static readonly List<Mod> AllMods = new List<Mod>();

		public readonly ModID ID;

		private Func<string, bool> _versionCheck;

		internal readonly List<Type> NetworkMessageTypes = new List<Type>();

		internal readonly List<Thing> Prefabs = new List<Thing>();

		internal readonly List<IPrefabSetup> Setups = new List<IPrefabSetup>();

		internal readonly List<Type> SaveDataTypes = new List<Type>();

		public bool MultiplayerRequired { get; private set; } = false;

		public Mod(string name, string version)
		{
			ID = new ModID(name, version);
			lock (allLock)
			{
				AllMods.Add(this);
			}
		}

		public void SetVersionCheck(Func<string, bool> versionCheck)
		{
			_versionCheck = versionCheck;
		}

		public void SetMultiplayerRequired()
		{
			MultiplayerRequired = true;
			ModNetworking.Initialize();
		}

		internal bool VersionValid(string version)
		{
			if (_versionCheck != null)
			{
				return _versionCheck(version);
			}
			return version == ID.Version;
		}

		public void AddSaveDataType<T>()
		{
			SaveDataPatch.Initialize();
			SaveDataTypes.Add(typeof(T));
		}

		public void RegisterNetworkMessage<T>() where T : ModNetworkMessage<T>, new()
		{
			SetMultiplayerRequired();
			NetworkMessageTypes.Add(typeof(T));
		}

		public void AddPrefabs(IEnumerable<GameObject> prefabs)
		{
			SetMultiplayerRequired();
			PrefabPatch.Initialize();
			Prefabs.AddRange(from prefab in prefabs
				select prefab.GetComponent<Thing>() into thing
				where (Object)(object)thing != (Object)null
				select thing);
		}

		public PrefabSetup<T> SetupPrefabs<T>(string name = null)
		{
			PrefabSetup<T> prefabSetup = new PrefabSetup<T>(name);
			Setups.Add(prefabSetup);
			return prefabSetup;
		}

		public PrefabSetup<Thing> SetupPrefabs(string name = null)
		{
			return SetupPrefabs<Thing>(name);
		}
	}
	public readonly struct ModID
	{
		public readonly string Name;

		public readonly string Version;

		public ModID(string name, string version)
		{
			Name = name;
			Version = version;
		}
	}
	internal static class PrefabPatch
	{
		private static object _initLock = new object();

		private static bool _initialized = false;

		public static void Initialize()
		{
			//IL_0026: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_002c: Expected O, but got Unknown
			//IL_007f: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_008d: Expected O, but got Unknown
			lock (_initLock)
			{
				if (!_initialized)
				{
					Harmony val = new Harmony("LaunchPadBooster.PrefabPatch");
					val.Patch((MethodBase)ReflectionUtils.Method(() => Prefab.LoadAll()), new HarmonyMethod(ReflectionUtils.Method(Expression.Lambda<Action>(Expression.Call(null, (MethodInfo)MethodBase.GetMethodFromHandle((RuntimeMethodHandle)/*OpCode not supported: LdMemberToken*/), Array.Empty<Expression>()), Array.Empty<ParameterExpression>()))), (HarmonyMethod)null, (HarmonyMethod)null, (HarmonyMethod)null, (HarmonyMethod)null);
					_initialized = true;
				}
			}
		}

		[HarmonyPrefix]
		private static void PatchPrefabs()
		{
			foreach (Mod allMod in Mod.AllMods)
			{
				foreach (Thing prefab in allMod.Prefabs)
				{
					if (!WorldManager.Instance.SourcePrefabs.Contains(prefab))
					{
						WorldManager.Instance.SourcePrefabs.Add(prefab);
						Debug.Log((object)("Add prefab to WorldManager: " + ((Object)prefab).name));
					}
					else
					{
						Debug.Log((object)("Already contains prefab: " + ((Object)prefab).name));
					}
				}
			}
			foreach (Mod allMod2 in Mod.AllMods)
			{
				foreach (IPrefabSetup setup in allMod2.Setups)
				{
					setup.Run(allMod2.Prefabs);
				}
			}
		}
	}
	public interface IPrefabSetup
	{
		internal void Run(IEnumerable<Thing> things);
	}
	public class PrefabSetup<T> : IPrefabSetup
	{
		public readonly string PrefabName;

		private readonly List<Action<T>> _setup = new List<Action<T>>();

		private readonly string _constructStack;

		private bool _ignoreEmpty = false;

		internal PrefabSetup(string prefabName)
		{
			PrefabName = prefabName;
			_constructStack = Environment.StackTrace;
		}

		void IPrefabSetup.Run(IEnumerable<Thing> things)
		{
			bool flag = false;
			foreach (Thing thing in things)
			{
				if (!(thing is T obj) || 1 == 0 || (PrefabName != null && PrefabName != thing.PrefabName))
				{
					continue;
				}
				flag = true;
				foreach (Action<T> item in _setup)
				{
					try
					{
						item(obj);
					}
					catch (Exception ex)
					{
						Debug.LogError((object)("Error setting up prefab " + thing.PrefabName));
						Debug.LogException(ex);
					}
				}
			}
			if (!flag && !_ignoreEmpty)
			{
				Debug.LogWarning((object)$"No prefabs matching {typeof(T)} {PrefabName} for setup at\n{_constructStack}");
			}
		}

		public PrefabSetup<T> IgnoreEmpty()
		{
			_ignoreEmpty = true;
			return this;
		}

		public PrefabSetup<T> RunFunc(Action<T> action)
		{
			_setup.Add(action);
			return this;
		}

		public PrefabSetup<T> SetBlueprintMaterials()
		{
			return RunFunc(_SetBlueprintMaterials);
		}

		private static void _SetBlueprintMaterials(T prefab)
		{
			object obj = prefab;
			Thing val = (Thing)((obj is Thing) ? obj : null);
			if ((Object)(object)val.Blueprint == (Object)null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Material blueprintMaterial = PrefabUtils.GetBlueprintMaterial();
			MeshRenderer[] componentsInChildren = val.Blueprint.GetComponentsInChildren<MeshRenderer>(true);
			foreach (MeshRenderer val2 in componentsInChildren)
			{
				Material[] sharedMaterials = ((Renderer)val2).sharedMaterials;
				for (int j = 0; j < sharedMaterials.Length; j++)
				{
					sharedMaterials[j] = blueprintMaterial;
				}
				((Renderer)val2).sharedMaterials = sharedMaterials;
			}
		}

		public PrefabSetup<T> SetPaintableColor(ColorType color, bool emissive = false)
		{
			//IL_0007: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0008: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			return RunFunc(delegate(T prefab)
			{
				//IL_0002: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
				_SetPaintableColor(prefab, color, emissive);
			});
		}

		private static void _SetPaintableColor(T prefab, ColorType color, bool emissive)
		{
			//IL_0042: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			object obj = prefab;
			Thing val = (Thing)((obj is Thing) ? obj : null);
			if ((Object)(object)val.PaintableMaterial == (Object)null)
			{
				Debug.LogWarning((object)("Prefab " + val.PrefabName + " does not have PaintableMaterial set"));
			}
			else
			{
				val.ReplaceMaterialWithColor(val.PaintableMaterial, color, emissive);
			}
		}

		public PrefabSetup<T> SetEntryTool(string toolName, int index = 0)
		{
			return RunFunc(delegate(T prefab)
			{
				_SetEntryTool(prefab, toolName, index);
			});
		}

		private static void _SetEntryTool(T prefab, string toolName, int index)
		{
			object obj = prefab;
			if (PrefabUtils.CanSetBuildTool((Thing)((obj is Thing) ? obj : null), toolName, index, out var structure, out var tool))
			{
				((ToolBasic)structure.BuildStates[index].Tool).ToolEntry = tool;
			}
		}

		public PrefabSetup<T> SetEntry2Tool(string toolName, int index = 0)
		{
			return RunFunc(delegate(T prefab)
			{
				_SetEntry2Tool(prefab, toolName, index);
			});
		}

		private static void _SetEntry2Tool(T prefab, string toolName, int index)
		{
			object obj = prefab;
			if (PrefabUtils.CanSetBuildTool((Thing)((obj is Thing) ? obj : null), toolName, index, out var structure, out var tool))
			{
				((ToolBasic)structure.BuildStates[index].Tool).ToolEntry2 = tool;
			}
		}

		public PrefabSetup<T> SetExitTool(string toolName, int index = 0)
		{
			return RunFunc(delegate(T prefab)
			{
				_SetExitTool(prefab, toolName, index);
			});
		}

		private static void _SetExitTool(T prefab, string toolName, int index)
		{
			object obj = prefab;
			if (PrefabUtils.CanSetBuildTool((Thing)((obj is Thing) ? obj : null), toolName, index, out var structure, out var tool))
			{
				structure.BuildStates[index].Tool.ToolExit = tool;
			}
		}

		public PrefabSetup<T> AddToMultiConstructorKit(string kitName, int order = -1)
		{
			return RunFunc(delegate(T prefab)
			{
				_AddToMultiConstructorKit(prefab, kitName, order);
			});
		}

		private static void _AddToMultiConstructorKit(T prefab, string kitName, int order = -1)
		{
			object obj = prefab;
			((Structure)((obj is Structure) ? obj : null)).AddToMultiConstructorKit(kitName, order);
		}
	}
	internal static class SaveDataPatch
	{
		private static object _initLock = new object();

		private static bool _initialized = false;

		public static void Initialize()
		{
			//IL_002e: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0034: Expected O, but got Unknown
			//IL_00d4: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_00e2: Expected O, but got Unknown
			lock (_initLock)
			{
				if (!_initialized)
				{
					Harmony val = new Harmony("LaunchPadBooster.SaveDataPatch");
					List<Type> dummyParam = null;
					val.Patch((MethodBase)ReflectionUtils.Method(() => XmlSaveLoad.AddExtraTypes(ref dummyParam)), new HarmonyMethod(ReflectionUtils.Method(() => PatchSaveData(ref dummyParam))), (HarmonyMethod)null, (HarmonyMethod)null, (HarmonyMethod)null, (HarmonyMethod)null);
				}
			}
		}

		[HarmonyPrefix]
		private static void PatchSaveData(ref List<Type> extraTypes)
		{
			foreach (Mod allMod in Mod.AllMods)
			{
				extraTypes.AddRange(allMod.SaveDataTypes);
			}
		}
	}
}
namespace LaunchPadBooster.Utils
{
	public static class PrefabNames
	{
		public const string Crowbar = "ItemCrowbar";

		public const string Screwdriver = "ItemScrewdriver";

		public const string WireCutters = "ItemWireCutters";

		public const string Wrench = "ItemWrench";

		public const string DuctTape = "ItemDuctTape";

		public const string AngleGrinder = "ItemAngleGrinder";

		public const string Drill = "ItemDrill";

		public const string Welder = "ItemWeldingTorch";

		public const string IronSheets = "ItemIronSheets";

		public const string GlassSheets = "ItemGlassSheets";

		public const string PlasticSheets = "ItemPlasticSheets";

		public const string SteelSheets = "ItemSteelSheets";

		public const string Pipe = "ItemKitPipe";

		public const string LiquidPipe = "ItemKitPipeLiquid";

		public const string CableCoil = "ItemCableCoil";

		public const string ElectronicParts = "ItemElectronicParts";
	}
	public static class PrefabUtils
	{
		private static Material _blueprintMaterial;

		public static Material GetColorMaterial(ColorType color, bool emissive = false)
		{
			//IL_0001: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0007: Expected I4, but got Unknown
			ColorSwatch colorSwatch = GameManager.GetColorSwatch((int)color);
			return emissive ? colorSwatch.Emissive : colorSwatch.Normal;
		}

		public static void ReplaceMaterialWithColor(this Thing thing, Material material, ColorType color, bool emissive = false)
		{
			//IL_0001: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			Material colorMaterial = GetColorMaterial(color, emissive);
			if ((Object)(object)thing.PaintableMaterial == (Object)(object)material)
			{
				thing.PaintableMaterial = colorMaterial;
			}
			MeshRenderer[] componentsInChildren = ((Component)thing).GetComponentsInChildren<MeshRenderer>(true);
			foreach (MeshRenderer val in componentsInChildren)
			{
				Material[] sharedMaterials = ((Renderer)val).sharedMaterials;
				for (int j = 0; j < sharedMaterials.Length; j++)
				{
					if ((Object)(object)sharedMaterials[j] == (Object)(object)material)
					{
						sharedMaterials[j] = colorMaterial;
					}
				}
				((Renderer)val).sharedMaterials = sharedMaterials;
			}
		}

		public static bool CanSetBuildTool(Thing thing, string toolName, int index, out Structure structure, out Item tool)
		{
			structure = (Structure)(object)((thing is Structure) ? thing : null);
			if ((Object)(object)structure == (Object)null)
			{
				tool = null;
				Debug.LogWarning((object)("Cannot set build tool on non-structure prefab " + thing.PrefabName));
				return false;
			}
			if (index < 0 || index >= structure.BuildStates.Count)
			{
				Debug.LogWarning((object)$"Invalid build state index {index} for prefab {((Thing)structure).PrefabName}");
				tool = null;
				return false;
			}
			tool = PrefabUtils.FindPrefab<Item>(toolName);
			if ((Object)(object)tool == (Object)null)
			{
				Debug.LogWarning((object)("Could not find build tool " + toolName + " for prefab " + ((Thing)structure).PrefabName));
				return false;
			}
			return true;
		}

		public static void SetEntryTool(this Structure structure, string toolName, int index = 0)
		{
			if (CanSetBuildTool((Thing)(object)structure, toolName, index, out var _, out var tool))
			{
				((ToolBasic)structure.BuildStates[index].Tool).ToolEntry = tool;
			}
		}

		public static void SetEntry2Tool(this Structure structure, string toolName, int index = 0)
		{
			if (CanSetBuildTool((Thing)(object)structure, toolName, index, out var _, out var tool))
			{
				((ToolBasic)structure.BuildStates[index].Tool).ToolEntry2 = tool;
			}
		}

		public static void SetExitTool(this Structure structure, string toolName, int index = 0)
		{
			if (CanSetBuildTool((Thing)(object)structure, toolName, index, out var _, out var tool))
			{
				structure.BuildStates[index].Tool.ToolExit = tool;
			}
		}

		public static void AddToMultiConstructorKit(this Structure structure, string kitName, int order = -1)
		{
			if (!CanSetBuildTool((Thing)(object)structure, kitName, 0, out var _, out var tool))
			{
				return;
			}
			MultiConstructor val = (MultiConstructor)(object)((tool is MultiConstructor) ? tool : null);
			if (val != null && !((Object)(object)val == (Object)null))
			{
				if (!val.Constructables.Contains(structure))
				{
					int index = ((order < 0 || order > val.Constructables.Count) ? val.Constructables.Count : order);
					val.Constructables.Insert(index, structure);
				}
				structure.BuildStates[0].Tool.ToolExit = tool;
			}
		}

		public static T FindPrefab<T>(string prefabName) where T : Thing
		{
			return FindPrefab<T>(Animator.StringToHash(prefabName));
		}

		public static Thing FindPrefab(string prefabName)
		{
			return PrefabUtils.FindPrefab<Thing>(prefabName);
		}

		public static T FindPrefab<T>(int prefabHash) where T : Thing
		{
			Thing val = WorldManager.Instance.SourcePrefabs.Find((Thing prefab) => (Object)(object)prefab != (Object)null && prefab.PrefabHash == prefabHash);
			return (T)(object)((val is T) ? val : null);
		}

		public static Thing FindPrefab(int prefabHash)
		{
			return PrefabUtils.FindPrefab<Thing>(prefabHash);
		}

		public static Material GetBlueprintMaterial()
		{
			if ((Object)(object)_blueprintMaterial == (Object)null)
			{
				MeshRenderer val = default(MeshRenderer);
				foreach (Thing sourcePrefab in WorldManager.Instance.SourcePrefabs)
				{
					if ((Object)(object)sourcePrefab.Blueprint == (Object)null || !sourcePrefab.Blueprint.TryGetComponent<MeshRenderer>(ref val))
					{
						continue;
					}
					_blueprintMaterial = ((Renderer)val).sharedMaterials[0];
					break;
				}
			}
			return _blueprintMaterial;
		}
	}
	public static class ReflectionUtils
	{
		public static MethodInfo Method<T>(Expression<Func<T>> expr)
		{
			return Method(expr.Body as MethodCallExpression);
		}

		public static MethodInfo Method(Expression<Action> expr)
		{
			return Method(expr.Body as MethodCallExpression);
		}

		public static MethodInfo Method(MethodCallExpression call)
		{
			return VirtualMethodIn(call.Method, call.Object?.Type);
		}

		public static MethodInfo AsyncMethod<T>(Expression<Func<T>> expr)
		{
			MethodInfo element = Method(expr);
			AsyncStateMachineAttribute customAttribute = element.GetCustomAttribute<AsyncStateMachineAttribute>();
			InterfaceMapping interfaceMap = customAttribute.StateMachineType.GetInterfaceMap(typeof(IAsyncStateMachine));
			MethodInfo methodInfo = Method(() => ((IAsyncStateMachine)null).MoveNext());
			for (int num = 0; num < interfaceMap.InterfaceMethods.Length; num++)
			{
				if (interfaceMap.InterfaceMethods[num] == methodInfo)
				{
					return interfaceMap.TargetMethods[num];
				}
			}
			throw new Exception("Could not find async method implementation");
		}

		public static MethodInfo PropertyGetter<T>(Expression<Func<T>> expr)
		{
			MemberExpression memberExpression = expr.Body as MemberExpression;
			PropertyInfo propertyInfo = memberExpression.Member as PropertyInfo;
			return VirtualMethodIn(propertyInfo.GetGetMethod(), memberExpression.Expression.Type);
		}

		public static MethodInfo PropertySetter(Expression<Action> expr)
		{
			MemberExpression memberExpression = expr.Body as MemberExpression;
			PropertyInfo propertyInfo = memberExpression.Member as PropertyInfo;
			return VirtualMethodIn(propertyInfo.GetSetMethod(), memberExpression.Expression.Type);
		}

		public static FieldInfo Field<T>(Expression<Func<T>> expr)
		{
			return (expr.Body as MemberExpression).Member as FieldInfo;
		}

		public static ConstructorInfo Constructor<T>(Expression<Func<T>> expr)
		{
			return (expr.Body as NewExpression).Constructor;
		}

		public static MethodInfo Operator<T>(Expression<Func<T>> expr)
		{
			Expression body = expr.Body;
			if (1 == 0)
			{
			}
			MethodInfo method;
			if (!(body is UnaryExpression unaryExpression))
			{
				if (!(body is BinaryExpression binaryExpression))
				{
					throw new Exception($"invalid operator expression type {expr.Body.GetType()}");
				}
				method = binaryExpression.Method;
			}
			else
			{
				method = unaryExpression.Method;
			}
			if (1 == 0)
			{
			}
			return method;
		}

		public static T CreateDelegate<T>(this MethodInfo method) where T : Delegate
		{
			return (T)method.CreateDelegate(typeof(T));
		}

		public static MethodInfo VirtualMethodIn(MethodInfo method, Type type)
		{
			if (!method.IsVirtual)
			{
				return method;
			}
			MethodInfo[] methods = type.GetMethods(BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			return methods.First((MethodInfo m) => m.GetBaseDefinition() == method.GetBaseDefinition()) ?? method;
		}
	}
}
namespace LaunchPadBooster.Patching
{
	internal class HarmonyConditionalClassProcessor : PatchClassProcessor
	{
		public HarmonyConditionalClassProcessor(Harmony instance, Type type, bool allowUnannotatedType = false)
			: base(instance, type, allowUnannotatedType)
		{
			//IL_009d: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_00a4: Expected O, but got Unknown
			IList list = (IList)(typeof(PatchClassProcessor).GetField("patchMethods", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic)?.GetValue(this));
			if (list == null || list.Count == 0)
			{
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field = list[0].GetType().GetField("info", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			List<object> list2 = new List<object>();
			if (field == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			foreach (object item in list)
			{
				HarmonyMethod val = (HarmonyMethod)field.GetValue(item);
				List<HarmonyConditionalPatch> source = val.method.GetCustomAttributes().OfType<HarmonyConditionalPatch>().ToList();
				foreach (HarmonyConditionalPatch item2 in source.Where((HarmonyConditionalPatch patch) => !patch.CanPatch))
				{
					if (val.debug == true)
					{
						Debug.Log((object)("Patch in " + type.FullName + "." + val.method.Name + " for " + val.declaringType.Name + "." + val.methodName + " ignored because specified condition is false!"));
						Debug.Log((object)item2.Description);
					}
					list2.Add(item);
				}
			}
			foreach (object item3 in list2)
			{
				list.Remove(item3);
			}
		}
	}
	[AttributeUsage(AttributeTargets.Class | AttributeTargets.Method)]
	public class HarmonyConditionalPatch : Attribute
	{
		public virtual bool CanPatch => true;

		public virtual string Description => "HarmonyConditionalPatch()";
	}
	public static class HarmonyExtensions
	{
		public static void ConditionalPatchAll(this Harmony harmony)
		{
			CollectionExtensions.Do<Type>((IEnumerable<Type>)AccessTools.GetTypesFromAssembly(new StackTrace().GetFrame(1).GetMethod().ReflectedType?.Assembly), (Action<Type>)delegate(Type type)
			{
				harmony.ConditionalPatch(type);
			});
		}

		public static void ConditionalPatchAll(this Harmony harmony, Type type)
		{
			CollectionExtensions.Do<Type>((IEnumerable<Type>)type.GetNestedTypes(), (Action<Type>)delegate(Type nType)
			{
				harmony.ConditionalPatchAll(nType);
			});
			harmony.ConditionalPatch(type);
		}

		public static void ConditionalPatch(this Harmony harmony, Type type)
		{
			List<HarmonyConditionalPatch> source = type.GetCustomAttributes(inherit: true).OfType<HarmonyConditionalPatch>().ToList();
			bool flag = type.GetCustomAttributes(inherit: true).OfType<HarmonyAttribute>().Any((HarmonyAttribute att) => att.info.debug == true);
			using (IEnumerator<HarmonyConditionalPatch> enumerator = source.Where((HarmonyConditionalPatch patch) => !patch.CanPatch).GetEnumerator())
			{
				if (enumerator.MoveNext())
				{
					HarmonyConditionalPatch current = enumerator.Current;
					if (flag)
					{
						Debug.Log((object)("Patch class " + type.FullName + " ignored because specified condition is false!"));
						Debug.Log((object)current.Description);
					}
					return;
				}
			}
			((PatchClassProcessor)new HarmonyConditionalClassProcessor(harmony, type)).Patch();
		}
	}
	[AttributeUsage(AttributeTargets.Class | AttributeTargets.Method)]
	public class HarmonyGameBranchPatch : HarmonyConditionalPatch
	{
		public readonly string[] Branches;

		private static string _currentBranch;

		public static string CurrentBranch
		{
			get
			{
				object obj = _currentBranch;
				if (obj == null)
				{
					obj = GetBetaBranchFromAcf() ?? SteamApps.CurrentBetaName ?? "public";
					_currentBranch = (string)obj;
				}
				return (string)obj;
			}
		}

		public override bool CanPatch => Branches.Contains(CurrentBranch);

		public override string Description => "Current: " + CurrentBranch + " Branches: [" + string.Join(",", Branches) + "]";

		private static string GetBetaBranchFromAcf()
		{
			string path = Path.Combine(StationSaveUtils.ExeDirectory.FullName, "steamapps", "appmanifest_544550.acf");
			if (!File.Exists(path))
			{
				return null;
			}
			string text = string.Join("\n", File.ReadAllLines(path));
			int num = text.IndexOf("\"UserConfig\"", StringComparison.Ordinal);
			int num2 = text.IndexOf("}", num, StringComparison.Ordinal);
			string text2 = text.Substring(num, num2 - num);
			if (num == -1 || num2 == -1)
			{
				return null;
			}
			num = text2.IndexOf("\"BetaKey\"", StringComparison.Ordinal) + 9;
			num2 = text2.IndexOf("\n", num, StringComparison.Ordinal);
			if (num == -1 || num2 == -1)
			{
				return null;
			}
			return text2.Substring(num, num2 - num).Replace("\"", "").Trim();
		}

		public HarmonyGameBranchPatch(params string[] branches)
		{
			Branches = branches;
		}
	}
	[AttributeUsage(AttributeTargets.Class | AttributeTargets.Method)]
	public class HarmonyGameVersionPatch : HarmonyConditionalPatch
	{
		public readonly Version MinVersion;

		public readonly Version MaxVersion;

		public static readonly Version CurrentVersion = typeof(GameManager).Assembly.GetName().Version;

		public override bool CanPatch => CurrentVersion >= MinVersion && CurrentVersion <= MaxVersion;

		public override string Description => $"Current: {CurrentVersion} Min: {MinVersion} Max: {MaxVersion}";

		public HarmonyGameVersionPatch(string minVersion, string maxVersion)
		{
			MinVersion = new Version(minVersion);
			MaxVersion = new Version(maxVersion);
		}
	}
}
namespace LaunchPadBooster.Networking
{
	public static class ModNetworking
	{
		private delegate void ConfirmationPanelDelegate(ConfirmationPanel instance, string title, string message, string button1Text, UnityAction button1Click, string button2Text = null, UnityAction button2Click = null, string button3Text = null, UnityAction button3Click = null, bool closeOnEscape = true);

		private static readonly object initLock = new object();

		private static bool initialized;

		private const byte NETWORK_VERSION = 1;

		private static readonly object assignLock = new object();

		private static List<Type> MessageTypes;

		private static Dictionary<Type, ushort> MessageTypeToIndex;

		private static ConfirmationPanelDelegate ShowConfirmationPanel;

		private static List<ModInfoFromServer> modsFromServer;

		private static byte serverNetVersion;

		private static List<ModID> modsFromClient;

		private static byte clientNetVersion;

		internal static void Initialize()
		{
			//IL_002d: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0037: Expected O, but got Unknown
			lock (initLock)
			{
				if (initialized)
				{
					return;
				}
				Harmony harmony = new Harmony("LaunchPadBooster.Networking");
				harmony.CreateClassProcessor(typeof(ModNetworkPatches), true).Patch();
				Prefab.OnPrefabsLoaded += delegate
				{
					ModNetworkCompatibilityPatch.RunPatch(harmony);
				};
				try
				{
					Type typeFromHandle = typeof(ConfirmationPanel);
					Type[] types = new Type[9]
					{
						typeof(string),
						typeof(string),
						typeof(string),
						typeof(UnityAction),
						typeof(string),
						typeof(UnityAction),
						typeof(string),
						typeof(UnityAction),
						typeof(bool)
					};
					MethodInfo method = typeFromHandle.GetMethod("SetUpPanel", types);
					MethodInfo method2 = typeFromHandle.GetMethod("ShowRaw", types);
					if (method != null)
					{
						ShowConfirmationPanel = method.CreateDelegate<ConfirmationPanelDelegate>();
					}
					else if (method2 != null)
					{
						ConfirmationPanelDelegate m2d = method2.CreateDelegate<ConfirmationPanelDelegate>();
						ShowConfirmationPanel = delegate(ConfirmationPanel instance, string title, string message, string b1text, UnityAction b1click, string _, UnityAction _, string _, UnityAction _, bool _)
						{
							m2d(instance, title, message, Localization.GetInterface(b1text, false), b1click);
						};
					}
				}
				catch (Exception ex)
				{
					Debug.LogException(ex);
				}
				if (ShowConfirmationPanel == null)
				{
					ShowConfirmationPanel = delegate(ConfirmationPanel _, string title, string message, string _, UnityAction click, string _, UnityAction _, string _, UnityAction _, bool _)
					{
						ConsoleWindow.PrintError(title + ": " + message, true);
					};
				}
				initialized = true;
			}
		}

		internal static void EnsureAssignment()
		{
			lock (assignLock)
			{
				if (MessageTypes != null)
				{
					return;
				}
				MessageTypes = new List<Type>();
				MessageTypeToIndex = new Dictionary<Type, ushort>();
				foreach (Mod allMod in Mod.AllMods)
				{
					if (!allMod.MultiplayerRequired)
					{
						continue;
					}
					foreach (Type networkMessageType in allMod.NetworkMessageTypes)
					{
						ushort value = (ushort)MessageTypes.Count;
						MessageTypes.Add(networkMessageType);
						MessageTypeToIndex[networkMessageType] = value;
					}
				}
			}
		}

		internal static void SerializeServerModInfo(RocketBinaryWriter writer)
		{
			EnsureAssignment();
			writer.WriteByte((byte)1);
			List<ModInfoFromServer> list = new List<ModInfoFromServer>();
			foreach (Mod allMod in Mod.AllMods)
			{
				if (!allMod.MultiplayerRequired)
				{
					continue;
				}
				ModInfoFromServer item = new ModInfoFromServer
				{
					ID = allMod.ID,
					Messages = new List<ModNetworkMessageMapping>()
				};
				foreach (Type networkMessageType in allMod.NetworkMessageTypes)
				{
					item.Messages.Add(new ModNetworkMessageMapping
					{
						Index = MessageTypeToIndex[networkMessageType],
						TypeName = networkMessageType.FullName
					});
				}
				list.Add(item);
			}
			writer.WriteUInt16((ushort)list.Count);
			foreach (ModInfoFromServer item2 in list)
			{
				item2.Serialize(writer);
			}
		}

		internal static void DeserializeServerModInfo(RocketBinaryReader reader)
		{
			modsFromServer = new List<ModInfoFromServer>();
			serverNetVersion = 0;
			try
			{
				serverNetVersion = reader.ReadByte();
				if (serverNetVersion == 1)
				{
					ushort num = reader.ReadUInt16();
					for (int i = 0; i < num; i++)
					{
						ModInfoFromServer item = default(ModInfoFromServer);
						item.Deserialize(reader);
						modsFromServer.Add(item);
					}
				}
			}
			catch (EndOfStreamException)
			{
			}
		}

		internal static bool ValidateModInfoClient()
		{
			if (serverNetVersion != 0 && serverNetVersion != 1)
			{
				FailClientJoin("Incompatible LaunchPadBooster version");
				return false;
			}
			Dictionary<string, Mod> dictionary = new Dictionary<string, Mod>();
			foreach (Mod allMod in Mod.AllMods)
			{
				dictionary[allMod.ID.Name] = allMod;
			}
			Dictionary<ushort, Type> dictionary2 = new Dictionary<ushort, Type>();
			foreach (ModInfoFromServer item in modsFromServer)
			{
				if (!dictionary.TryGetValue(item.ID.Name, out var value))
				{
					FailClientJoin("Missing mod required by server: " + item.ID.Name + "@" + item.ID.Version);
					return false;
				}
				dictionary.Remove(item.ID.Name);
				if (!value.VersionValid(item.ID.Version))
				{
					FailClientJoin("Incompatible mod version: " + item.ID.Name + " @ " + value.ID.Version + "(local) <> " + item.ID.Version + "(server)");
					return false;
				}
				Dictionary<string, Type> dictionary3 = new Dictionary<string, Type>();
				foreach (Type networkMessageType in value.NetworkMessageTypes)
				{
					dictionary3[networkMessageType.FullName] = networkMessageType;
				}
				foreach (ModNetworkMessageMapping message in item.Messages)
				{
					if (!dictionary3.TryGetValue(message.TypeName, out var value2))
					{
						FailClientJoin("Missing network message type: " + value.ID.Name + " " + message.TypeName);
						return false;
					}
					dictionary3.Remove(message.TypeName);
					dictionary2[message.Index] = value2;
				}
				using Dictionary<string, Type>.KeyCollection.Enumerator enumerator5 = dictionary3.Keys.GetEnumerator();
				if (enumerator5.MoveNext())
				{
					string current5 = enumerator5.Current;
					FailClientJoin("Server missing network message type: " + value.ID.Name + " " + current5);
					return false;
				}
			}
			if (dictionary.Count > 0)
			{
				StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
				stringBuilder.AppendLine("Server missing required mods:");
				foreach (Mod value4 in dictionary.Values)
				{
					stringBuilder.Append(" " + value4.ID.Name + "@" + value4.ID.Version);
				}
				FailClientJoin(stringBuilder.ToString());
				return false;
			}
			Type[] array = new Type[dictionary2.Count];
			Dictionary<Type, ushort> dictionary4 = new Dictionary<Type, ushort>();
			foreach (KeyValuePair<ushort, Type> item2 in dictionary2)
			{
				ushort key = item2.Key;
				Type value3 = item2.Value;
				ushort num = key;
				if (num >= array.Length)
				{
					FailClientJoin("Internal error: invalid message assignment received from server");
					return false;
				}
				array[num] = value3;
				dictionary4[value3] = num;
			}
			MessageTypes = new List<Type>(array);
			MessageTypeToIndex = dictionary4;
			return true;
		}

		private static void FailClientJoin(string message)
		{
			//IL_0031: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0040: Expected O, but got Unknown
			ConsoleWindow.PrintError(message, true);
			NetworkClient.StopConnectionTimer();
			NetworkManager.EndConnection();
			ShowConfirmationPanel(Singleton<ConfirmationPanel>.Instance, "Incompatible mods", message, "ButtonOk", new UnityAction(NetworkClient.Cancel));
		}

		internal static void SerializeClientModInfo(RocketBinaryWriter writer)
		{
			EnsureAssignment();
			writer.WriteByte((byte)1);
			List<ModID> list = new List<ModID>();
			foreach (Mod allMod in Mod.AllMods)
			{
				if (allMod.MultiplayerRequired)
				{
					list.Add(allMod.ID);
				}
			}
			writer.WriteUInt16((ushort)list.Count);
			foreach (ModID item in list)
			{
				writer.WriteModID(item);
			}
		}

		internal static void DeserializeClientModInfo(RocketBinaryReader reader)
		{
			modsFromClient = new List<ModID>();
			clientNetVersion = 0;
			try
			{
				clientNetVersion = reader.ReadByte();
				if (clientNetVersion == 1)
				{
					ushort num = reader.ReadUInt16();
					for (int i = 0; i < num; i++)
					{
						ModID item = reader.ReadModID();
						modsFromClient.Add(item);
					}
				}
			}
			catch (EndOfStreamException)
			{
			}
		}

		internal static bool ValidateModInfoServer(long hostId, VerifyPlayer msg)
		{
			if (clientNetVersion != 0 && clientNetVersion != 1)
			{
				RejectClientJoin(hostId, msg, "Incompatible LaunchPadBooster version");
				return false;
			}
			Dictionary<string, Mod> dictionary = new Dictionary<string, Mod>();
			foreach (Mod allMod in Mod.AllMods)
			{
				dictionary[allMod.ID.Name] = allMod;
			}
			foreach (ModID item in modsFromClient)
			{
				if (!dictionary.TryGetValue(item.Name, out var value))
				{
					RejectClientJoin(hostId, msg, "Server missing required mod: " + item.Name + "@" + item.Version);
					return false;
				}
				dictionary.Remove(item.Name);
				if (!value.VersionValid(item.Version))
				{
					RejectClientJoin(hostId, msg, "Incompatible mod version: " + item.Name + " @ " + value.ID.Version + "(server) <> " + item.Version + "(client)");
					return false;
				}
			}
			if (dictionary.Count > 0)
			{
				StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
				stringBuilder.AppendLine("Client missing required mods:");
				foreach (Mod value2 in dictionary.Values)
				{
					stringBuilder.Append(" " + value2.ID.Name + "@" + value2.ID.Version);
				}
				RejectClientJoin(hostId, msg, stringBuilder.ToString());
				return false;
			}
			return true;
		}

		private static void RejectClientJoin(long hostId, VerifyPlayer msg, string message)
		{
			//IL_0015: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_001a: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0020: Expected O, but got Unknown
			//IL_003d: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0042: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_004a: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_005d: Expected O, but got Unknown
			Client val = new Client(hostId, msg.OwnerConnectionId, msg.ClientId, msg.Name, msg.ClientConnectionMethod);
			ConsoleWindow.PrintError("Rejecting client " + msg.Name + ": " + message, true);
			NetworkServer.SendToClient<Handshake>((MessageBase<Handshake>)new Handshake
			{
				HandshakeState = (HandshakeType)3,
				Message = message
			}, (NetworkChannel)134, val);
			NetworkManager.CloseP2PConnectionServer(val);
		}

		public static void WriteMessageType(RocketBinaryWriter writer, Type type)
		{
			if (typeof(IModNetworkMessage).IsAssignableFrom(type))
			{
				writer.WriteByte(byte.MaxValue);
				writer.WriteUInt16(MessageTypeToIndex[type]);
			}
			else
			{
				writer.WriteByte(MessageFactory.GetIndexFromType(type));
			}
		}

		public static Type ReadMessageType(RocketBinaryReader reader)
		{
			byte b = reader.ReadByte();
			if (b == byte.MaxValue)
			{
				ushort index = reader.ReadUInt16();
				return MessageTypes[index];
			}
			return MessageFactory.GetTypeFromIndex(b);
		}

		internal static void WriteModID(this RocketBinaryWriter writer, ModID id)
		{
			writer.WriteString(id.Name);
			writer.WriteString(id.Version);
		}

		internal static ModID ReadModID(this RocketBinaryReader reader)
		{
			string name = reader.ReadString();
			string version = reader.ReadString();
			return new ModID(name, version);
		}
	}
	public struct ModNetworkMessageMapping
	{
		public ushort Index;

		public string TypeName;

		public void Serialize(RocketBinaryWriter writer)
		{
			writer.WriteUInt16(Index);
			writer.WriteString(TypeName);
		}

		public void Deserialize(RocketBinaryReader reader)
		{
			Index = reader.ReadUInt16();
			TypeName = reader.ReadString();
		}
	}
	public struct ModInfoFromServer
	{
		public ModID ID;

		public List<ModNetworkMessageMapping> Messages;

		public void Serialize(RocketBinaryWriter writer)
		{
			writer.WriteModID(ID);
			ushort num = (ushort)Messages.Count;
			writer.WriteUInt16(num);
			for (int i = 0; i < num; i++)
			{
				Messages[i].Serialize(writer);
			}
		}

		public void Deserialize(RocketBinaryReader reader)
		{
			ID = reader.ReadModID();
			ushort num = reader.ReadUInt16();
			Messages = new List<ModNetworkMessageMapping>(num);
			for (int i = 0; i < num; i++)
			{
				ModNetworkMessageMapping item = default(ModNetworkMessageMapping);
				item.Deserialize(reader);
				Messages.Add(item);
			}
		}
	}
	public interface IModNetworkMessage
	{
	}
	public abstract class ModNetworkMessage<T> : ProcessedMessage<T>, IModNetworkMessage where T : ModNetworkMessage<T>, new()
	{
	}
	internal static class ModNetworkPatches
	{
		[HarmonyPatch(typeof(VerifyPlayerRequest), "Serialize")]
		[HarmonyPostfix]
		private static void VerifyPlayerRequest_Serialize(RocketBinaryWriter writer)
		{
			ModNetworking.SerializeServerModInfo(writer);
		}

		[HarmonyPatch(typeof(VerifyPlayerRequest), "Deserialize")]
		[HarmonyPostfix]
		private static void VerifyPlayerRequest_Deserialize(RocketBinaryReader reader)
		{
			ModNetworking.DeserializeServerModInfo(reader);
		}

		[HarmonyPatch(typeof(VerifyPlayerRequest), "Process")]
		[HarmonyPrefix]
		private static bool VerifyPlayerRequest_Process(long hostId)
		{
			return !NetworkManager.IsClient || ModNetworking.ValidateModInfoClient();
		}

		[HarmonyPatch(typeof(VerifyPlayer), "Serialize")]
		[HarmonyPostfix]
		private static void VerifyPlayer_Serialize(RocketBinaryWriter writer)
		{
			ModNetworking.SerializeClientModInfo(writer);
		}

		[HarmonyPatch(typeof(VerifyPlayer), "Deserialize")]
		[HarmonyPostfix]
		private static void VerifyPlayer_Deserialize(RocketBinaryReader reader)
		{
			ModNetworking.DeserializeClientModInfo(reader);
		}

		[HarmonyPatch(typeof(VerifyPlayer), "Process")]
		[HarmonyPrefix]
		private static bool VerifyPlayer_Process(long hostId, VerifyPlayer __instance)
		{
			return !NetworkManager.IsServer || ModNetworking.ValidateModInfoServer(hostId, __instance);
		}

		[HarmonyPatch(typeof(Localization), "GetFallbackInterface", new Type[] { typeof(int) })]
		[HarmonyPrefix]
		private static bool Localization_GetFallbackInterface(int hash, ref string __result)
		{
			//IL_0001: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0008: Invalid comparison between Unknown and I4
			if ((int)Localization.CurrentLanguage == 45 && !Localization.InterfaceExists(hash))
			{
				__result = string.Empty;
				return false;
			}
			return true;
		}

		[HarmonyPatch(typeof(RocketBinaryReader), "ReadMessageType")]
		[HarmonyPrefix]
		private static bool RocketBinaryReader_ReadMessageType(RocketBinaryReader __instance, ref Type __result)
		{
			__result = ModNetworking.ReadMessageType(__instance);
			return false;
		}

		[HarmonyPatch(typeof(RocketBinaryWriter), "WriteMessageType")]
		[HarmonyPrefix]
		private static bool RocketBinaryWriter_WriteMessageType(RocketBinaryWriter __instance, Type value)
		{
			ModNetworking.WriteMessageType(__instance, value);
			return false;
		}

		[HarmonyPatch(typeof(NetworkBase), "DeserializeReceivedData")]
		[HarmonyTranspiler]
		private static IEnumerable<CodeInstruction> NetworkBase_DeserializeReceivedData(IEnumerable<CodeInstruction> instructions)
		{
			//IL_0003: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0009: Expected O, but got Unknown
			//IL_0027: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_002d: Expected O, but got Unknown
			//IL_006f: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0075: Expected O, but got Unknown
			//IL_0093: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0099: Expected O, but got Unknown
			//IL_00a9: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_00af: Expected O, but got Unknown
			CodeMatcher val = new CodeMatcher(instructions, (ILGenerator)null);
			val.MatchStartForward((CodeMatch[])(object)new CodeMatch[1]
			{
				new CodeMatch((OpCode?)OpCodes.Isinst, (object)typeof(Handshake), (string)null)
			});
			val.ThrowIfInvalid("Could not find insertion point for NetworkBase.DeserializeReceivedData");
			val.Advance(-1);
			CodeInstruction instruction = val.Instruction;
			val.Advance(2);
			CodeInstruction instruction2 = val.Instruction;
			val.Advance(1);
			val.InsertAndAdvance((CodeInstruction[])(object)new CodeInstruction[1]
			{
				new CodeInstruction(instruction)
			});
			val.InsertAndAdvance((CodeInstruction[])(object)new CodeInstruction[1]
			{
				new CodeInstruction(OpCodes.Isinst, (object)typeof(IModNetworkMessage))
			});
			val.InsertAndAdvance((CodeInstruction[])(object)new CodeInstruction[1]
			{
				new CodeInstruction(instruction2)
			});
			return val.Instructions();
		}
	}
	internal static class ModNetworkCompatibilityPatch
	{
		public static void RunPatch(Harmony harmony)
		{
			//IL_00a9: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_00af: Expected O, but got Unknown
			MethodInfo methodInfo = ReflectionUtils.Method(() => NetworkBase.DeserializeReceivedData(0L, (RocketBinaryReader)null));
			Patches patchInfo = Harmony.GetPatchInfo((MethodBase)methodInfo);
			if (patchInfo == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			HarmonyMethod val = new HarmonyMethod(ReflectionUtils.Method(() => Patch(null)));
			foreach (Patch prefix in patchInfo.Prefixes)
			{
				harmony.Patch((MethodBase)prefix.PatchMethod, (HarmonyMethod)null, (HarmonyMethod)null, val, (HarmonyMethod)null, (HarmonyMethod)null);
			}
		}

		private static IEnumerable<CodeInstruction> Patch(IEnumerable<CodeInstruction> instructions)
		{
			//IL_0003: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_0009: Expected O, but got Unknown
			//IL_0035: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_003f: Expected O, but got Unknown
			//IL_0068: Unknown result type (might be due to invalid IL or missing references)
			//IL_006e: Expected O, but got Unknown
			CodeMatcher val = new CodeMatcher(instructions, (ILGenerator)null);
			val.MatchStartForward((CodeMatch[])(object)new CodeMatch[1] { CodeMatch.op_Implicit(new CodeInstruction(OpCodes.Newobj, (object)ReflectionUtils.Constructor(() => new HashSet<Type>()))) });
			if (val.IsValid)
			{
				val.Advance(1);
				val.InsertAndAdvance((CodeInstruction[])(object)new CodeInstruction[2]
				{
					new CodeInstruction(OpCodes.Dup, (object)null),
					CodeInstruction.Call((Expression<Action>)(() => AddModMessageTypes(null)))
				});
			}
			return val.Instructions();
		}

		private static void AddModMessageTypes(HashSet<Type> types)
		{
			foreach (Mod allMod in Mod.AllMods)
			{
				ExtensionMethods.AddRange<Type>((ICollection<Type>)types, (ICollection<Type>)allMod.NetworkMessageTypes);
			}
		}
	}
}
